name: tbone-construction/reviews-grid
title: Reviews Grid
description: Editable reviews grid with average-rating card.

subheading.default: Don't just take our word for it. Read what your Idaho neighbors have to say about working with Travis and the team.

default.name: Bart Schuerman
default.text: This is my third Trex project with Travis. He is dependable efficient honest and does top quality work.

default.name: Trex Customer
default.text: Knowledge of installation was incredible. Travis explains the steps necessary and was accurate about how long the project would take.

default.name: Jose Rincon
default.text: Travis came through. His work was great, he was very attentive and listened to all my concerns.

default.name: Karen Baldrige
default.text: Travis with T-Bone Construction is very professional, timely and priced very fairly.

default.name: Home Depot Referral
default.text: The fence is done well. It looks great and he put in a gate. It was completed in the time frame he stated (2 days).

default.name: Robert Humphrey
default.text: He replied even before we got home from the store! He has been very congenial and has worked hard to accommodate our budget.

default.name: Rick Sandison, MD
default.text: Travis did a great job. He is a very friendly person. I thought the price of his work was fair.

default.name: Tangela Schuerman
default.text: Great Work. His attention to detail is spot on. He is very thorough with his job and makes sure you are happy.
